messages.body: I’m guessing you might have missed my first message because NEW CLIENTS paying Full Price instead of Discounted ones usually sounds like a good deal.  If you're interested, just reply ‘YES’ and we’ll chat here. If not, r…

Hello Mia, I hope you are having a great day yet! I saw you on groupon few days back and I saw that you were offering Discounts on your service.  I am Simar. I work with many salon and spa owners and PROMISE them NEW PAY…
Let me know when can I connect with you. :)
Hey Mia, Good Morning!  I hope you are doing well. I tried connecting with you over a phone call. Here is my number: +1 9783125094
Please leave your message for 513-888-5111.
Kanak?
Hey Mia
All the updates must be done before Monday evening. :)
Hey Mia,  I wanted to update you on your request.  I've already escalated this matter to our respected team.  They're currently reviewing everything and working on a resolution for you.
My pleasure Mia.
I sincerely apologize for not being as responsive as I should have been.
Thank you Kanak!
Thank you so much for your patience and understanding.

Subject: Re: Meeting Minutes and Next Steps\n\nBody: Follow-up on Our Previous Conversation Hi Mia, It was lovely connecting with you previously. I hope you’ve been doing well since our last discussion. On behalf of Krip…
Hey how are we doing on these changes
All of the photos I have sent above I would like them to be fixed fit the page in mobile and desktop version. So that everything is concise and cohesive.

Hello Mia, We’re usually not very active over the weekend — apologies for the delay. It was Kanak’s birthday, so she couldn’t respond earlier. I’ve made a note of your request and have started getting it taken care of.
